> Generated for `@gravity-ui/playwright-tools@1.1.0`

# Playwright Tools

> A collection of utilities for writing Playwright tests, including browser actions, HAR-based request recording and replay, and component testing fixtures.
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/playwright-tools` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/playwright-tools/main/README.md) for full documentation.
